common.Tarayıcı ayarlarınızdan çerezleri silebi: You can delete or block cookies from your browser settings. However, disabling some cookies may cause parts of the site to function improperly.
common.Site analizi ve içerik sunumu için güven: We may use trusted third-party services (e.g. analytics tools) for site analysis and content delivery. These services are subject to their own privacy policies.
common.100 metre uzunluğunda, otel odalarından: A 100% sheltered world, 100 meters long, invisible from hotel rooms. A pier built over the sea with changing cabins and sun loungers — swim freely.
common.Erkek misafirlerimize ayrılmış, denizin: A private beach area reserved for our male guests, where you can enjoy the vastness of the sea. Savor the sun and blue to your heart's content.
common.Çevreden tamamen yalıtılmış, yalnızca ka: A completely isolated pool area exclusively for our female guests. Swim, relax and pamper yourself as you wish.
common.Adin’de tatilini dolu dolu değerlendirme: For our guests who want to make the most of every minute of their holiday; we offer a rich program from cinema to concerts, daily activities to sports.
common.Adin Resort Hotel olarak, web sitemizin: As Adin Resort Hotel, we care about making our website and facilities accessible to everyone. This page explains our approach to accessibility.
common.Web sitemizi WCAG (Web İçeriği Erişilebi: We strive to develop our website in accordance with WCAG (Web Content Accessibility Guidelines) AA standards. Meaningful visual descriptions, keyboard navigation and sufficient color contrast are among our priorities.
common.Tesisimizde, hareket kısıtlılığı olan mi: Our facility features accessible rooms, barrier-free passages and support equipment for guests with reduced mobility.
common.Özel ihtiyaçlarınızı rezervasyon sırasın: If you share your special needs with us during reservation, we will do our best to plan your stay as comfortably as possible.
common.Erişilebilirlik, bizim için süregelen bi: Accessibility is an ongoing commitment for us. We value your feedback to continuously improve our experience.
common.Erişilebilirlikle ilgili herhangi bir zo: If you experience any accessibility difficulties or have suggestions, please contact us. We are ready to find the best solution for you.
common.Hik¢yenizin aşkla taçlandığı yerde, size: Where your story is crowned with love, a romantic beginning full of special privileges just for you.
common.Hikyenizin aşkla taçlandığı yerde, size: Where your story is crowned with love, a romantic beginning full of exclusive privileges.
common.Sadece bavullarınızı alın, geri kalan he: Just pack your bags, we've taken care of everything else. Romantic room decoration, personalized service and a dream honeymoon experience awaits you.
common.Bu kampanyadan yararlanmak ve güncel koş: Submit your request to benefit from this campaign and learn about current conditions.
common.Adin’i daha yakından tanımak, değerlerim: Take a few minutes to get to know Adin better and discover our values and understanding of hospitality.
common.Adin Resort Hotel; Antalya Alanya İnceku: Adin Resort Hotel, located in the most special bay of İncekum, Alanya, offers a unique holiday experience with its 100% halal concept.
common.Kadın ve erkeklere özel ayrı plaj ve hav: From separate beaches and pools for men and women to halal-certified cuisine, we offer unforgettable moments with our quality service approach.
common.Halal in Travel Awards 2024’te “Yılın Mü: Awarded "Muslim-Friendly Hotel of the Year" at the Halal in Travel Awards 2024.
common.Helal turizmde dünya standartlarını beli: Setting world standards in halal tourism; offering an unforgettable holiday where privacy, comfort and peace come together for our guests.
common.Her misafirimize, değerlerine saygı duyu: To every guest, a meticulously thought-out and understated holiday experience where your values are respected.
common.Modern tasarımı, geniş yaşam alanları ve: Premium rooms with modern design, spacious living areas and unique sea views.
common.Bahçe manzaralı, doğayla iç içe, huzurlu: Flora rooms for a peaceful stay surrounded by nature with garden views.
common.Özel havuzu, geniş bahçesi ve mahremiyet: Experience exclusivity in villa living with private pool, spacious garden and privacy.
common.Alanya'nın incisi Adin Beach Hotel'de lü: Luxury, peace and privileged service come together at Adin Beach Hotel, the jewel of Alanya.
common.Rezervasyon iptal ve iade koşullarımız a: Our reservation cancellation and refund conditions are stated below. Conditions may vary depending on the type of reservation.
common.Standart rezervasyonlarda, giriş tarihin: For standard reservations, free cancellation is possible up to a certain period before the check-in date.
common.Erken rezervasyon ve özel kampanyalı rez: Different cancellation conditions apply for early booking and special campaign reservations.
common.İade hakkı doğan ödemeler, iptal talebin: Refunds for eligible payments are processed within 14 business days following the approval of the cancellation request.
common.Tarih veya oda tipi değişikliği talepler: Date or room type change requests are evaluated based on availability.
common.Bildirimde bulunmaksızın giriş yapılmaya: For no-show reservations without prior notice, the reservation terms apply in full.
common.İptal ve iade talepleriniz için lütfen r: For cancellation and refund requests, please contact our reservation team.
common.Bu web sitesini kullanarak aşağıdaki kul: By using this website, you accept the following terms of use.
common.Bu site, Adin Resort Hotel tarafından bi: This site is operated by Adin Resort Hotel for informational and reservation request purposes.
common.Sitedeki tüm metin, görsel ve tasarım öğ: All text, visual and design elements on the site belong to Adin Resort Hotel and are protected by copyright.
common.Site üzerinden iletilen rezervasyon tale: Reservation requests submitted through the site constitute a preliminary request and do not constitute a confirmed reservation.
common.Fiyatlar ve müsaitlik, talep tarihindeki: Prices and availability are subject to change based on conditions at the time of request.
common.Sitedeki bilgilerin güncel ve doğru olma: While we take utmost care to ensure the information on the site is current and accurate, no warranty is given.
common.Resmi rezervasyon ve iletişim kanallarım: Our official reservation and communication channels are this website and the contact information provided on the site.
common.6698 sayılı Kişisel Verilerin Korunması: Within the scope of the Personal Data Protection Law No. 6698 (KVKK), your personal data may be processed.
common.Kişisel verileriniz, veri sorumlusu sıfa: Your personal data is collected by Adin Resort Hotel as the data controller for the following purposes.
common.Rezervasyon ve iletişim talepleriniz kap: Within the scope of your reservation and communication requests, your name, contact information and request details are processed.
common.Verileriniz; rezervasyon taleplerinizin: Your data is processed for the purposes of evaluating your reservation requests, communicating with you and fulfilling your requests.
common.Kişisel verileriniz, yalnızca rezervasyo: Your personal data is not shared with third parties unless necessary for reservation and service processes.
common.KVKK’nın 11. maddesi uyarınca; verilerin: Under Article 11 of the KVKK, you have the right to learn whether your data is being processed, request correction or deletion, and object to processing.
common.Bahçemizden sofranıza uzanan, %100 helal: A 100% halal and non-alcoholic taste journey from our garden to your table. World cuisines meticulously prepared.
common.A’la carte restoranlarımız rezervasyonlu: Our à la carte restaurants operate on a reservation basis. Submit your request now for your stay.
common.Yemyeşil bir doğanın içerisinde güne kuş: Would you like to wake up to birdsong in lush greenery? Our Flora rooms offer the unique beauty of nature.
common.%100 deniz manzaralı olan odamız yemyeşi: Our room with 100% sea view lets you experience the Mediterranean amidst lush nature, feeling the breeze on your skin.
common.Unutulmaz tatil anılarını biriktireceğin: Experience unique moments and create unforgettable holiday memories in our exceptional rooms.
common.Konfor, rahatlık ve ferahlık… Tatil bekl: Comfort, convenience and spaciousness… Let your holiday expectations meet your dreams.
common.Doğal güzelliklerin içinde, yaklaşık 53: Surrounded by natural beauty, the Flora Gardens feature approximately 53 different plant species.
common.Çocuklarınız şen kahkahaları, sizin keyi: With your children's joyful laughter and your pleasant conversations, an experience as beautiful as a dream awaits you at Adin.
common.Hayallerinizdeki tatilden fazlası Adin H: More than your dream holiday awaits you at Adin Hotel's Flora Duplex Rooms!
common.Yaklaşık 53 farklı bitki çeşidiyle çevre: Surrounded by approximately 53 different plant species, rejuvenate both spiritually and physically.
common.Egzotik güzelliklerle bezenmiş, masmavi: Adorned with exotic beauties, feel the freshness of the turquoise Mediterranean at every moment.
common.Çocuklarınızın yanınızda mı olmasını ist: Do you want your children close to you? With the Flora standard room, your little ones will always be by your side.
common.Yaklaşık 53 farklı bitki çeşidinin bulun: Located in the flora area with approximately 53 different plant species, our 1+1 duplex rooms offer spacious accommodation with separate living and sleeping areas.
common.Flora odalarımızın bulunduğu binaların h: Each building of our Flora rooms consists of 3 floors and there is no elevator. They offer a peaceful nature experience.
common.53 farklı bitki çeşidinin bulunduğu, tat: Adorn your holiday with breezes from nature in our rooms surrounded by 53 different plant species.
common.Akdeniz güneşinin tüm gün odanızın içine: A room at one with nature, where the Mediterranean sun fills your room all day long.
common.Yeşilin huzuruna açılan Flora odalarımız: Book one of our Flora rooms opening onto peaceful greenery. Let us prepare a special offer for you.
common.Her odamız, denizin ve doğanın huzurunu: Each of our rooms is designed to bring the peace of the sea and nature indoors.
common.Size en uygun odayı birlikte bulalım. Ta: Let us find the best room for you. Share your dates and we'll prepare a special offer.
common.Deniz Manzaralı Premium Aile Oda için si: Request your special price and availability for the Sea View Premium Family Room.
common.Connection Oda, ara kapıyla birleşen iki: The Connection Room consists of two separate rooms joined by a connecting door, offering spacious privacy for large families.
common.Deniz Manzaralı Premium Connection Oda i: Request your special price and availability for the Sea View Premium Connection Room.
common.Akdeniz’in maviliğine açılan iki katlı b: A two-storey world opening onto the blue Mediterranean; space, light and serenity combined.
common.Sabahın ilk ışıkları ile uyanın, üst kat: Wake with the first light and watch the endless sea from the panoramic windows upstairs.
common.Deniz Manzaralı Premium Dubleks Royal Od: Request your special price and availability for the Sea View Premium Duplex Royal Room.
common.Deniz Manzaralı Premium Dubleks Superior: Request your special price and availability for the Sea View Premium Duplex Superior Room.
common.Deniz Manzaralı Premium Engelli Oda için: Request your special price and availability for the Sea View Premium Accessible Room.
common.Deniz Manzaralı Premium Standart Oda içi: Request your special price and availability for the Sea View Premium Standard Room.
common.Deniz Manzaralı Premium Suit Oda için si: Request your special price and availability for the Sea View Premium Suite.
common.Size Özel Villa — Muhafazakr Villa Tatil: Private Villa — Conservative Villa Holiday — Adin Hotel
common.Özel havuzlu villalarımızda, size ait bi: Relax in your own world in our villas with private pool. Share your dates and let us prepare a special offer.
common.Daha yaşanabilir bir gelecek için; enerj: For a more livable future; we act with environmental awareness from energy saving to waste management and nature conservation.
We believe nature is entrusted to us. We carry this responsibility with the understanding of sustainability at every step.
common.Çevre dostu ulaşımı destekliyoruz. Elekt: We support eco-friendly transportation. With our electric vehicle charging station, you can travel in an environmentally friendly way.
common.Küçük adımların büyük değişimler yarattı: Believing that small steps create big changes; we carry our sustainability efforts forward for future generations.

footer.description: Adin Resort Hotel offers a comfortable, peaceful, and luxurious holiday experience with 100% halal concept and private beach and pool areas for men and women in Alanya, Antalya.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Adin Resort Hotel. All rights reserved.

anasayfa.title: The Address of Your Dream Vacation
anasayfa.description: Experience an unforgettable holiday with your family in peace with 100% halal concept in Alanya İncekum.

odalar.title: Rooms & Suites
odalar.description: From premium sea-view rooms to private pool villas, enjoy comfort with options to suit every taste.

lezzet.title: Dining
lezzet.description: Discover the fresh flavors of the Mediterranean crafted by our master chefs in our halal-certified kitchen.

deniz-ve-havuz.title: Sea and Pool
deniz-ve-havuz.description: Enjoy the cool waters of the Mediterranean in our women-only and men-only private beach and pool areas.

eglence.title: Entertainment & Activities
eglence.description: Activities for all ages, live shows, and a holiday full of fun awaits you.

toplanti.title: Meetings & Events
toplanti.description: An ideal venue for professional meetings and events accompanied by a unique sea view.

hakkimizda.title: About Us
hakkimizda.description: Take a few minutes to get to know Adin better and discover our values and understanding of hospitality.

surdurulebilirlik.title: Sustainability
surdurulebilirlik.description: With our nature-respecting tourism approach, we work to leave a more livable world for future generations.

firsatlar.title: Offers & Campaigns
firsatlar.description: We make your dream vacation more accessible with special offers and campaigns.

bize-ulasin.title: Contact Us
bize-ulasin.description: Contact us for your questions or reservation requests, and we will get back to you as soon as possible.

adin-ayricaliklari.title: Adin Privileges
adin-ayricaliklari.description: At Adin, every guest is special. Experience a holiday full of privileges designed just for you.

slides.title: Best Holiday Hotel of the Year Award 2024
slides.description: We were awarded first place in the 'Best Family Hotel of the Year' category at international tourism awards.

slides.title: 94 out of 100 Guests Leave Satisfied
slides.description: We stand out with our emphasis on guest satisfaction. 94 out of every 100 guests leave highly satisfied with their hotel experience.

slides.title: 100% Halal Product Certificate
slides.description: All our food and products are sourced from halal-certified producers. All our products are certified 100% halal with international halal certification.

slides.title: 75 out of 100 Guests Choose Again
slides.description: 75% of our guests re-book to stay at Adin. This rate is the most concrete indicator of the service quality we provide.

premium.title: Sea View Premium Rooms
premium.description: Enjoy the Mediterranean in Premium Rooms with 100% sea views, blending the natural beauty of the blue ocean with comfort.

flora.title: Garden View Flora Rooms
flora.description: Are you ready for a holiday filled with bird songs as real as dreams, accompanied by your children's joyful laughter?

villa.title: Private Villa
villa.description: Are you ready for a holiday fit for sultans? Our villa for guests who want to feel special during their vacation.

kadinlara-ozel.title: Women-Only Areas
kadinlara-ozel.description: Liberate your mind and soul. A warm beach. The gentle touch of the sea. Are you ready to spend your most beautiful, comfortable, and peaceful days on women-only beaches and shores?

bahce.title: From Our Garden to Your Table
bahce.description: From the soil to your plates with your own hands. Pick or stroll. Your products arriving at your table in the magnificent tranquility of the soil are grown in our garden.

helal.title: Halal Cuisine
helal.description: Maximum importance is given to ensuring that every product served at Adin Hotel meets halal food standards. With our 100% Halal Certificate, everything has been thought down to the finest detail for you.

balayi.title: A Perfect Honeymoon Awaits You
balayi.description: The liberating power of blue. The endless energy of the sun. Memorable holiday moments that turn into a fairy tale at the magical beginning of happy couples.
